brandingSkill.description: New skill that conducts structured branding interview via AskUserQuestion and produces BRANDING.md artifact at .planning/BRANDING.md.

brandingRole.description: New agent role module for the branding interview agent. Follows existing role module conventions.

brandingContextInjection.description: Reads .planning/BRANDING.md and returns formatted branding context string for injection into enrichedPrepareSetContext().

brandingDisplayStage.description: Display module entries for the branding stage banner.

fully-optional.description: Branding is entirely optional. Absence of BRANDING.md must not affect any other RAPID workflow. enrichedPrepareSetContext() must gracefully skip branding context when BRANDING.md does not exist.

concise-artifact.description: BRANDING.md must be concise (50-150 lines) to avoid bloating execution prompts when injected as context.

planning-root-location.description: BRANDING.md is stored at .planning/BRANDING.md (planning root), consistent with PROJECT.md, ROADMAP.md, REQUIREMENTS.md.

definition.scope: Create the branding system: new /rapid:branding skill, role-branding.md agent, BRANDING.md artifact format, enrichedPrepareSetContext() branding injection, and display.cjs stage entries.

tasks.description: Create skills/branding/SKILL.md with structured AskUserQuestion interview flow
tasks.acceptance: Skill can be invoked as /rapid:branding and conducts branding interview

tasks.description: Create src/modules/roles/role-branding.md agent role following existing conventions
tasks.acceptance: Role module follows existing role conventions

tasks.description: Define BRANDING.md artifact format and write to .planning/BRANDING.md
tasks.acceptance: Artifact is generated with consistent structure, 50-150 lines

tasks.description: Add branding context injection to enrichedPrepareSetContext() in execute.cjs
tasks.acceptance: Branding context injected when BRANDING.md exists, gracefully skipped when absent

tasks.description: Add branding stage entries to display.cjs STAGE_VERBS and STAGE_BG maps

acceptance: Branding context is injected into execution prompts when available
Branding is fully optional -- absence does not affect any workflow
